title: OpenAI says AI browsers may always be vulnerable to prompt injection attacks
summary: OpenAI表示，具有代理能力的AI浏览器（如Atlas）可能始终面临提示注入攻击的风险，但该公司正在通过基于大语言模型的自动化攻击者加强其网络安全。

title: ChatGPT launches a year-end review like Spotify Wrapped
summary: The experience includes awards, poems, and pictures referencing your year in chat.

trans_summary: 该体验包括奖项、诗歌和图片，引用了你在聊天中的一年。

title: Splat’s app uses AI to turn your photos into coloring pages for kids
summary: The app uses AI to convert personal photos into coloring pages for children.

title: ChatGPT: Everything you need to know about the AI-powered chatbot
summary: The article provides a timeline of ChatGPT product updates and releases, updated throughout the year.
trans_title: ChatGPT：关于这款由AI驱动的聊天机器人你需要知道的一切
trans_summary: 文章提供了ChatGPT产品更新和发布的年表，并在全年进行了持续更新。

title: OpenAI allows users to directly adjust ChatGPT’s enthusiasm level
summary: OpenAI now lets users directly adjust ChatGPT's enthusiasm level, adding to the existing options for setting a base style and tone.
trans_title: OpenAI允许用户直接调整ChatGPT的热情程度
trans_summary: OpenAI现在允许用户直接调整ChatGPT的热情程度，增加了设置基础风格和语气的现有选项。

title: New York governor Kathy Hochul signs RAISE Act to regulate AI safety
summary: New York governor Kathy Hochul has signed the RAISE Act, which mandates large AI developers to disclose safety protocols and report incidents within 72 hours.
trans_title: 纽约州长凯西·霍楚签署RAISE法案以规范AI安全
trans_summary: 纽约州长凯西·霍楚签署了RAISE法案，该法案要求大型AI开发商披露其安全协议，并在72小时内报告安全事故。

title: Ex-Splunk execs’ startup Resolve AI hits $1B valuation with Series A
summary: Resolve AI, a startup founded by former Splunk executives, has reached a $1 billion valuation after its Series A funding round, led by Lightspeed Venture Partners.
trans_title: 前Splunk高管创立的初创公司Resolve AI在A轮融资后估值达到10亿美元
trans_summary: 由前Splunk高管创立的初创公司Resolve AI在A轮融资后估值达到10亿美元，该轮融资由Lightspeed Venture Partners领投。

title: Cursor continues acquisition spree with Graphite deal
summary: Cursor has acquired Graphite, an AI code review assistant valued at $290 million.
trans_title: Cursor继续收购狂潮，达成Graphite交易
trans_summary: Cursor收购了估值2.9亿美元的人工智能代码审查助手Graphite。

title: Yann LeCun confirms his new ‘world model’ startup, reportedly seeks $5B+ valuation
summary: 著名AI科学家Yann LeCun确认他已成立一家新创业公司，据报道该公司寻求超过50亿美元的估值。他不会担任该公司的CEO。
trans_title: Yann LeCun确认他的新‘世界模型’创业公司，据报道寻求超过50亿美元的估值
trans_summary: 著名AI科学家Yann LeCun确认他已成立一家新创业公司，据报道该公司寻求超过50亿美元的估值。他不会担任该公司的CEO。

title: Hardware’s brutal week: iRobot, Luminar, and Rad Power go bankrupt
summary: iRobot, Luminar, and Rad Power Bikes filed for bankruptcy, highlighting the challenges of manufacturing in a tense global trade environment.
trans_title: 硬件界的残酷一周：iRobot、Luminar 和 Rad Power 宣告破产
trans_summary: iRobot、Luminar 和 Rad Power Bikes 宣布破产，突显了在全球贸易紧张局势下制造实体产品的挑战。

title: OpenAI adds new teen safety rules to ChatGPT as lawmakers weigh AI standards for minors
summary: OpenAI updated its guidelines for interactions with users under 18 and provided new AI literacy resources, but concerns persist about the effectiveness of these policies.
trans_title: OpenAI为ChatGPT添加新的青少年安全规则，立法者权衡未成年人的AI标准
trans_summary: OpenAI更新了其AI模型与18岁以下用户互动的指南，并提供了新的AI素养资源，但对这些政策的实际效果仍存疑虑。

title: Known uses voice AI to help you go on more in-person dates
summary: Known, a new dating app using voice AI, has seen 80% of its introductions lead to in-person dates during its test phase in San Francisco, outperforming swipe-based apps.
trans_title: Known使用语音AI帮助你进行更多面对面约会
trans_summary: 在旧金山的测试阶段，使用语音AI的新约会应用Known发现其介绍中有80%导致了面对面约会，这一比例远高于基于滑动的应用。

title: Meta is developing a new image and video model for a 2026 release, report says
summary: Meta is developing a new image and video model, set for release in 2026, to enhance its capabilities in understanding visual information and reasoning.
trans_title: 据报道，Meta正在开发一款新的图像和视频模型，计划于2026年发布
trans_summary: Meta正在开发一款新的图像和视频模型，计划于2026年发布，以增强其理解和推理视觉信息的能力。

title: OpenAI is reportedly trying to raise $100B at an $830B valuation
summary: OpenAI reportedly aims to raise $100B at an $830B valuation by the end of Q1 2026, potentially involving sovereign wealth funds.
trans_title: 据报道，OpenAI正试图以8300亿美元的估值筹集1000亿美元
trans_summary: 据报道，ChatGPT的制造商OpenAI计划在2026年第一季度末前筹集1000亿美元，公司可能会邀请主权财富基金参与投资。
